title: Implement per-gun state sync throttling strategy (stateDirty + lastStateSyncTick + key moment immediate sync)

reference_files.reason: Throttling strategy - stateDirty flag, lastStateSyncTick, 2-tick interval, key moment immediate sync (install/uninstall, switch main hand, join world)
GunSyncS2CPacket trigger timing - state modified triggers next tick sync

acceptance_criteria: GunSyncThrottleManager (server-side) maintains per-gun stateDirty flag and lastStateSyncTick (keyed by gunInstanceUuid or player+slot)
GunState set operations set stateDirty=true on the throttle manager (no immediate sync)
Server tick handler checks: if stateDirty==true AND currentTick - lastStateSyncTick >= 2, sends GunSyncS2CPacket with current state, clears dirty, updates lastStateSyncTick
Key moment immediate sync (bypasses throttle): plugin install/uninstall, main hand switch, player join world - sends GunSyncS2CPacket immediately regardless of throttle interval
Throttle interval is 2 ticks (100ms) as a named constant (not magic number)
Throttle state is runtime-only (not persisted to NBT), stored in server-side manager
Throttle manager cleans up entries for guns no longer in player inventories (avoid memory leak)
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/state/GunSyncTickHandler.java (server tick event listener for throttle check)
